summary: Stage 25.2 Frontend Testing Complete - Moderation redesign with Carousel, Chat system, Reject flow with reason all verified working

passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Page loads with header 'Модерация', stats cards (4 Объявлений, 0 Партнёров), tabs

passed_tests.test: Listing modal has Carousel/Slider for photos
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Embla Carousel component working with prev/next navigation buttons
SUCCESS - Clicking next/prev buttons navigates between photos correctly

passed_tests.test: Reject button opens modal with reason input
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Shows 'Отклонение объявления' modal with textarea and quick reason badges

passed_tests.test: Quick reason badges in reject modal
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Found badges: Некачественные фото, Неполное описание, Неверная цена, Дубликат

passed_tests.test: Write to owner button opens message modal
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Shows 'Написать владельцу' modal with textarea for message
SUCCESS - Page loads with search input, empty state 'Нет сообщений' when no conversations

passed_tests.test: Info Grid in modal shows Price, Commission, Date, Featured
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Grid shows Цена (฿111/день), Комиссия (15%), Создано (28.02.2026), Рекомендуем (Да/Нет)
SUCCESS - Clicked toggle changed from 'Нет' to 'Да'
SUCCESS - Mobile responsive design working, carousel and buttons visible

passed_tests.test: Partner messages page with Read Receipts code review
passed_tests.result: SUCCESS - Code implements Check (unread) and CheckCheck (read) icons from lucide-react

critical_code_review_comments: Supabase service key is hardcoded in multiple frontend files (admin/moderation/page.js, admin/messages/page.js, partner/messages/[id]/page.js) - should use environment variables for security
API routes use 'use server' directive incorrectly - this is for Server Actions not API routes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase data (4 pending listings)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stage 25.2 features verified: 1) Moderation page with Carousel using embla-carousel-react, 2) Reject modal with reason textarea and quick reason badges, 3) Message owner modal, 4) Admin messages page, 5) Featured toggle (Рекомендуем) working, 6) Mobile responsive design. Partner messages page requires Supabase auth to view conversations with Read Receipts.
notes: Reject flow creates conversation and message directly in Supabase tables
Telegram notification sent if partner has telegram_id
Conversations table is new - created by migration_stage_25.sql
Messages table uses is_read field for read receipts
